game_info.title: Color Road 3D
game_info.concept:
Roll to the ball which has the same color!

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/color-road/id1342468799

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Roll to the ball which has the same color!
Avoid the ball which has different color.
Good luck!
game_info.description: Roll your ball down the endless road! Match your ball's color with other balls to collect them and gain points. Avoid balls of different colors, or you'll crash! Use ramps to change your color and soar through the air. How far can you go?
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left / A: Move Left
- Arrow Right / D: Move Right
- Arrow Up / W: Boost Speed (Hold)
- Arrow Down / S: Brake / Slow Down
- Enter: Start Game
- Esc: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart Game (on Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify player movement and lane changing responsiveness.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game. Simulate a "Left" key press for 500ms, then a "Right" key press for 500ms. Measure the player's X position to ensure it moves left and then right relative to the center.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player X position decreases significantly when Left is pressed and increases when Right is pressed. Movement should be smooth within lane boundaries.
TEST_1.description: Verify player movement and lane changing responsiveness.
TEST_1.strategy: Start the game. Simulate a "Left" key press for 500ms, then a "Right" key press for 500ms. Measure the player's X position to ensure it moves left and then right relative to the center.
TEST_1.expected: Player X position decreases significantly when Left is pressed and increases when Right is pressed. Movement should be smooth within lane boundaries.

TEST_2.test_description: Test collision with a matching color ball (Score increment).
TEST_2.strategy_description: Force spawn a matching color ball directly in front of the player. Allow the player to move forward and collide with it.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Score increases by the ball's value. Game continues (Phase remains PLAYING). The collected ball is removed from the scene.
TEST_2.description: Test collision with a matching color ball (Score increment).
TEST_2.strategy: Force spawn a matching color ball directly in front of the player. Allow the player to move forward and collide with it.
TEST_2.expected: Score increases by the ball's value. Game continues (Phase remains PLAYING). The collected ball is removed from the scene.

TEST_3.test_description: Test collision with a different color ball (Game Over).
TEST_3.strategy_description: Force spawn a non-matching color ball directly in front of the player. Allow collision.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Game phase changes to GAME_OVER_LOSE. Player movement stops.
TEST_3.description: Test collision with a different color ball (Game Over).
TEST_3.strategy: Force spawn a non-matching color ball directly in front of the player. Allow collision.
TEST_3.expected: Game phase changes to GAME_OVER_LOSE. Player movement stops.

TEST_4.strategy_description: Spawn a Color Ramp that changes color to Blue. Steer player into the ramp.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Player color property changes to Blue. Player executes a jump/launch physics response.
TEST_4.strategy: Spawn a Color Ramp that changes color to Blue. Steer player into the ramp.
TEST_4.expected: Player color property changes to Blue. Player executes a jump/launch physics response.

TEST_5.strategy_description: Start game, let it run for 1 second. Press ESC. Wait 1 second. Check game time/physics updates.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: GameState changes to PAUSED. Entities do not update positions while paused. Pressing ESC again resumes PLAYING.
TEST_5.strategy: Start game, let it run for 1 second. Press ESC. Wait 1 second. Check game time/physics updates.
TEST_5.expected: GameState changes to PAUSED. Entities do not update positions while paused. Pressing ESC again resumes PLAYING.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Trigger Game Over. Press 'R'. Check game state and score.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: GameState returns to START. Score resets to 0. Entities are cleared and player is reset to starting position.
